steps.title: Identify the defining goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between the two sculptures — that's the decisive criterion for choosing the right answer.

steps.title: Apply the criterion to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D uses “Unlike” to directly contrast them: De Haan's spells out a phrase while Kawauchi's is an abstract squiggle.

Choices A, B, and C all describe similarities (both are sculptures, both use neon, both artists used neon) rather than differences.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
